allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Name, Mode; Write-Output '---'; if \(Test-Path app\) { Get-ChildItem app -Recurse -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\) } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem design-reference -Recurse -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path + '\\', ''\) }; Write-Output '---'; if \(Test-Path gradle\\libs.versions.toml\) { Get-Content gradle\\libs.versions.toml })

PowerShell(try { [xml]$m = \(Invoke-WebRequest 'https://dl.google.com/android/maven2/androidx/compose/compose-bom/maven-metadata.xml' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $m.metadata.versioning.versions.version | Select-Object -Last 6 } catch { Write-Output "bom lookup failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output '--- KSP ---'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://search.maven.org/solrsearch/select?q=g:%22com.google.devtools.ksp%22+AND+a:%22symbol-processing-api%22&core=gav&rows=12&wt=json'; $r.response.docs | Select-Object -ExpandProperty v } catch { Write-Output "ksp lookup failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($sdk = 'C:\\Users\\rajveer\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk'; $mgr = "$sdk\\cmdline-tools\\latest\\bin\\sdkmanager.bat"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $mgr\)\) { Get-ChildItem "$sdk\\cmdline-tools" -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { echo y | & $mgr "platforms;android-37" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://search.maven.org/solrsearch/select?q=g:%22org.robolectric%22+AND+a:%22robolectric%22&rows=3&wt=json'; $r.response.docs | Select-Object id, latestVersion } catch { Write-Output "lookup failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://search.maven.org/solrsearch/select?q=g:%22androidx.test%22+AND+a:%22core%22&rows=3&wt=json'; $r2.response.docs | Select-Object id, latestVersion } catch { Write-Output "lookup failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { [xml]$m = \(Invoke-WebRequest 'https://dl.google.com/android/maven2/androidx/test/core/maven-metadata.xml' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Output "androidx.test:core release: $\($m.metadata.versioning.release\)" } catch { Write-Output "lookup failed" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod 'https://search.maven.org/solrsearch/select?q=g:%22org.jetbrains.kotlinx%22+AND+a:%22kotlinx-coroutines-test%22&rows=2&wt=json'; $r.response.docs | Select-Object id, latestVersion } catch { Write-Output "lookup failed" })
